.. _odscounter:

odscounter
==========

**inherit_from**: ['plotobserver']

Summary
-------

+--------------+--------------+--------------+--------------+
|keyword       |default       |attribute     |value         |
+==============+==============+==============+==============+
|**format**    |None          |              |              |
+--------------+--------------+--------------+--------------+
|              |              |*lowercase*   |False         |
+--------------+--------------+--------------+--------------+
|              |              |*optional*    |True          |
+--------------+--------------+--------------+--------------+
|              |              |*unique*      |True          |
+--------------+--------------+--------------+--------------+
+--------------+--------------+--------------+--------------+
|**varname**   |observer      |              |              |
+--------------+--------------+--------------+--------------+
|              |              |*unique*      |True          |
+--------------+--------------+--------------+--------------+
+--------------+--------------+--------------+--------------+
